blockedUrlPatterns.title: Blocked URL patterns
blockedUrlPatterns.description: URL patterns where BrowserKing is blocked. Each pattern is matched against the page's hostname and path (e.g. 'example.com/admin'). Use '*' as a wildcard to match any sequence of characters. Patterns are case-insensitive; a leading 'http://', 'https://', or 'www.' is ignored. A bare domain with no path is treated as '<domain>/*'. Example: 'github.com/myorg/*' blocks all pages under that path.
